comparison_to_other_aligners: Updated wfmash -p 95 was chr3-positive for this Fig5 window; sweepGA/FastGA default raw PAF was chr3-negative; minimap2 asm5 all-chain produced no evaluable complete PAF before cancellation.
note: Primary minimap2 asm5 all-chain Slurm jobs were cancelled after ~2h35m because node-local paf.gz files remained gzip-header-sized and no complete PAF was copied back; chr3 support is therefore not evaluable from this run.
